spec.name: Under The Hole
spec.description: You are in a small chamber underneath the slippery hole, far below the pyramid now. The floor is strewn with bones. To the south is a small rocky crevasse.

south.description: You see a rocky crevasse that proceeds deep under the pyramid.

extra_descs.description: The bones have whitened and cracked in the dry air, apparently the remains of adventurers, thieves, and creatures that did not survive the fall.
